description: Follow live sports and esports as a quiet text play-by-play inside your editor. A tree of live games in the activity bar, a relay in an Output channel, and a compact score in the status bar. No accounts or keys for the core sports.
viewContainer.title: Vibe Stealth
view.games.name: Live Games
command.refreshGames.title: Refresh Games
command.followGame.title: Follow Game (start text relay)
command.unfollowGame.title: Unfollow Game
command.openRelay.title: Open Relay Output
command.clearRelay.title: Clear Relay Output
command.pickFollowed.title: Followed Games…
command.setPandascoreToken.title: Set PandaScore API Token (enables esports)
config.locale.description: Language for relay system lines and UI labels. 'auto' follows the VS Code display language.
config.pollSecondsLive.description: Seconds between play-by-play polls for a followed live game.
config.pollSecondsScoreboard.description: Seconds between scoreboard refreshes while the Live Games view is visible.
config.backfillLimit.description: When you follow a game already in progress, at most this many recent plays are backfilled.
config.maxFollowedGames.description: Maximum number of simultaneously followed games.
config.statusBar.enabled.description: Show the compact score of the most recently followed game in the status bar.
config.relay.showEmoji.description: Prefix relay lines with a sport emoji.
config.gameState.enabled.description: Show live current-state rows (bases/count and batting order, formation and starting XI, or LoL draft) under a followed game in the tree. Turning this off also stops the extra LoL livestats request.
config.detail.description: How much play-by-play detail to relay. 'Detailed' adds pitch-by-pitch baseball, NHL shots/hits, and a LoL kill feed — several times more lines per game, and one extra request per poll for a live LoL game.
config.detail.summary: One line per completed at-bat and only the key hockey events — today's behavior.
config.detail.detailed: Adds every pitch (type, speed, zone, count), NHL shots/hits/takeaways, and LoL kills, towers and dragons with the players involved.
config.logos.enabled.description: Show real team and league logos on tree rows. Each logo is downloaded once and cached locally, then reused offline. Turn this off to use plain icons and download nothing.
config.leagues.enabled.description: Leagues shown in the tree, as provider:league ids (e.g. 'espn:eng.1', 'mlb:mlb', 'nhl:nhl', 'pandascore:lol'). Empty = built-in default set.
